test_cases.test_case: Log in with valid credentials
steps: 1. Enter <valid username> in the Username field
2. Enter <valid password> in the Password field
test_cases.expected_result: redirects to Dashboard

test_cases.test_case: Access as Guest
test_cases.expected_result: unauthenticated browsing

test_cases.test_case: View Cookies Notice
test_cases.expected_result: provides cookie usage information

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Username field blank and submit
steps: 2. Fill the Password field with <valid password>
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Username field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Password field blank and submit
steps: 1. Fill the Username field with <valid username>
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Password field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Submit with invalid credentials
steps: 1. Fill the Username field with <valid username>
2. Fill the Password field with <invalid password>
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; Password field is cleared; error shown: 'Invalid or empty credentials'

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to access as guest without authentication
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page

test_cases.test_case: Enter a very long username
steps: 1. Enter a string of 200+ characters in the Username field
2. Enter a valid password in the Password field
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; user is redirected to Dashboard or an error indicates the username is too long

test_cases.test_case: Enter special characters in the Username field
steps: 2. Enter a valid password in the Password field
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; user is redirected to Dashboard or an error indicates invalid characters in the Username

test_cases.test_case: Enter leading and trailing whitespace in the Username field
steps: 1. Enter '   user123   ' in the Username field
2. Enter a valid password in the Password field
test_cases.expected_result: Leading/trailing whitespace is trimmed; saved value shown in detail page has no extra spaces

test_cases.test_case: Enter empty credentials
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error message shows 'Invalid or empty credentials'; Password field is cleared, Username field retains input

test_cases.test_case: Enter valid username and empty password
steps: 1. Enter a valid username in the Username field
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error message shows 'Invalid or empty credentials'; Password field is cleared, Username field retains input

test_cases.test_case: Enter valid credentials
steps: 1. Enter a valid username in the Username field
2. Enter a valid password in the Password field
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; user is redirected to Dashboard

test_cases.test_case: Create a new calendar event
test_cases.expected_result: A new calendar entry is created

test_cases.test_case: Navigate to the previous month
test_cases.expected_result: Navigates to the previous month

test_cases.test_case: Navigate to the next month
test_cases.expected_result: Navigates to the next month

test_cases.test_case: Open full calendar view
test_cases.expected_result: Opens dedicated calendar view

test_cases.test_case: Open calendar data management
steps: 1. Click the 'Import or export calendars' link
test_cases.expected_result: Opens calendar data management

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to create a new calendar event without filling required fields
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; no calendar entry is created; error shown on required fields

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to navigate to the previous month without any events
test_cases.expected_result: Calendar view updates to the previous month; no error shown

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to navigate to the next month without any events
test_cases.expected_result: Calendar view updates to the next month; no error shown

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to open full calendar view without authentication
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to open calendar data management without authentication
steps: 1. Click on the 'Import or export calendars' link
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page

test_cases.test_case: Rapid submission of new calendar event
steps: 2. Immediately click the 'New Event' button again
test_cases.expected_result: Second submission attempt is blocked; only one calendar entry is created

test_cases.test_case: Navigate to previous month rapidly
preconditions: User is on the Calendar block
steps: 2. Immediately click the 'Previous Month' button again
test_cases.expected_result: Navigation to previous month is blocked; the calendar remains on the current month

test_cases.test_case: Navigate to next month rapidly
preconditions: User is on the Calendar block
steps: 2. Immediately click the 'Next Month' button again
test_cases.expected_result: Navigation to next month is blocked; the calendar remains on the current month

test_cases.test_case: Enter long text in search activities field
steps: 1. Enter a very long string (200+ characters) in the 'Search Activities' field
test_cases.expected_result: Search field displays an error indicating the input exceeds the maximum allowed length

test_cases.test_case: Enter special characters in search activities field
steps: 1. Enter special characters (e.g., @#$%^&*) in the 'Search Activities' field
test_cases.expected_result: Search field displays an error indicating invalid characters

test_cases.test_case: Reset the dashboard page to default
test_cases.expected_result: The page resets to default

test_cases.test_case: Open Add a block page
test_cases.expected_result: opens Add a block page

test_cases.test_case: Cancel adding a block
preconditions: Add a block page is open
test_cases.expected_result: returns to Dashboard without adding a block

test_cases.test_case: Configure an existing block
preconditions: At least one existing block is present
steps: 1. Click the options menu of an existing block
test_cases.expected_result: Configuration options displayed for the block

test_cases.test_case: Move an existing block
preconditions: At least one existing block is present
steps: 1. Click the options menu of an existing block
test_cases.expected_result: Block is moved to a new position

test_cases.test_case: Delete an existing block
preconditions: At least one existing block is present
steps: 1. Click the options menu of an existing block
test_cases.expected_result: Block is deleted from the Dashboard

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to reset page to default while in Edit mode
steps: 1. Click the 'Reset page to default' button
test_cases.expected_result: Page does not reset; layout remains unchanged

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to add a block without valid input
steps: 1. Click the '+ Add a block' button
test_cases.expected_result: Add a block page opens; no block is added

test_cases.test_case: Cancel adding a block and verify no block is added
steps: 1. Click the '+ Add a block' button
test_cases.expected_result: Returns to Dashboard without adding a block

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to configure an existing block without selecting it
steps: 1. Click the 'configure' button without selecting a block
test_cases.expected_result: Configuration options are not displayed; no action occurs

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to move an existing block without selecting it
steps: 1. Click the 'move' button without selecting a block
test_cases.expected_result: Block is not moved; no action occurs

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to delete an existing block without selecting it
steps: 1. Click the 'delete' button without selecting a block
test_cases.expected_result: Block is not deleted; no action occurs

test_cases.test_case: Rapidly click the Reset page to default button
steps: 1. Click the 'Reset page to default' button
2. Immediately click the 'Reset page to default' button again
test_cases.expected_result: Second click is ignored; the page remains reset to default

test_cases.test_case: Rapidly click the Add a block button
steps: 1. Click the '+ Add a block' button
2. Immediately click the '+ Add a block' button again
test_cases.expected_result: Second click is ignored; the Add a block page opens only once

test_cases.test_case: Click Cancel after opening Add a block page
preconditions: Add a block page is opened
test_cases.expected_result: Returns to Dashboard without adding a block; no new block is created

test_cases.test_case: Delete existing block after rapid clicks
steps: 1. Click the 'delete' option from the options menu of an existing block
test_cases.expected_result: Only one block is deleted; the second click is ignored

test_cases.test_case: Star a course
preconditions: Courses are displayed on the My Courses page
steps: 1. Click the three-dot menu on a course card
2. Select 'Star this course' from the menu
test_cases.expected_result: Course starred; pinned to the top

test_cases.test_case: Remove a course from view
preconditions: Courses are displayed on the My Courses page
steps: 1. Click the three-dot menu on a course card
2. Select 'Remove from view' from the menu
test_cases.expected_result: Course removed from view; hidden

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Search field blank and submit
test_cases.expected_result: No courses are displayed; the Search field remains empty

test_cases.test_case: Select an invalid option in the Status dropdown
steps: 1. Select 'Invalid Status' in the Status dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: No courses are displayed; the Status dropdown shows 'Invalid Status' as selected

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to star a course without selecting a course
steps: 1. Click on the 'Star this course' action without selecting any course
test_cases.expected_result: No course is starred; the action is not performed

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to remove a course from view without selecting a course
steps: 1. Click on the 'Remove from view' action without selecting any course
test_cases.expected_result: No course is removed from view; the action is not performed

test_cases.test_case: Rapidly star a course after starring another
preconditions: User is on the My Courses page with multiple courses displayed
steps: 1. Click the three-dot menu on the first course card
3. Immediately click the three-dot menu on the second course card
test_cases.expected_result: Both courses are starred; the first course remains pinned at the top and the second course is also pinned above others.

test_cases.test_case: Rapidly remove a course from view after removing another
preconditions: User is on the My Courses page with multiple courses displayed
steps: 1. Click the three-dot menu on the first course card
3. Immediately click the three-dot menu on the second course card
test_cases.expected_result: Both courses are removed from view; they no longer appear in the course list.

test_cases.test_case: Search with leading and trailing whitespace
preconditions: User is on the My Courses page
steps: 1. Enter '   Course Name   ' in the Search field
test_cases.expected_result: Search results display courses matching 'Course Name' without leading or trailing whitespace.

test_cases.test_case: Search with special characters
preconditions: User is on the My Courses page
test_cases.expected_result: Search results display courses matching '@Course#Name!' or show a message indicating no matches found.

test_cases.expected_result: Page redirects to login page

test_cases.test_case: Successfully save and display course settings

4. Select <visibility option> from the Course Visibility dropdown
5. Enter <valid start date> in the Course Start Date field

steps: 1. Enter <valid course full name> in the Course Full Name field
2. Enter <valid course short name> in the Course Short Name field
3. Select <valid course category> from the Course Category dropdown

preconditions: User is in Quick grading mode
test_cases.expected_result: Grade is saved successfully; table reflects the new grade of 0

test_cases.test_case: Enter maximum grade value in the Grade field
preconditions: User is in Quick grading mode
test_cases.expected_result: Grade is saved successfully; table reflects the new grade of 100

test_cases.test_case: Enter a grade value above maximum in the Grade field
preconditions: User is in Quick grading mode
test_cases.expected_result: Saving is blocked; inline error shows 'Grade must be between 0 and 100'

test_cases.test_case: Enter a very long student name in the search field
steps: 1. Enter a string of 200+ characters in the Student_Name search field
test_cases.expected_result: Search is processed; either results are shown or an error indicates the input is too long

test_cases.test_case: Submit Grader Report with valid inputs
steps: 1. Select 'Grader report' from the Report_Type_Selector dropdown
2. Enter <valid student name> in the User_Search field
4. Edit a grade cell to a valid value within the configured grade range
test_cases.expected_result: The changes are applied; the grade table reflects the updated values

test_cases.test_case: Edit Grade with valid input
steps: 1. Click the three-dot menu on a grade cell
3. Enter a valid grade value within the configured grade range
test_cases.expected_result: Grade updated successfully

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to save changes with a grade value outside the configured grade range
steps: 1. Open the grade cell for a student
2. Enter a <grade value outside the configured grade range>
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Grade_Value field indicating it must be within configured grade range; form does not submit; no changes are saved.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to edit a grade with an invalid grade value
preconditions: User selects a grade to edit
steps: 1. Enter a <grade value outside the configured grade range>
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Grade_Value field indicating it must be within configured grade range; grade is not updated.

test_cases.test_case: Edit grade value at the lower boundary of the configured grade range
steps: 2. Click the three-dot menu on a grade cell
4. Enter the minimum grade value in the Grade_Value field
test_cases.expected_result: Grade is updated successfully; the new grade value is displayed in the table

test_cases.test_case: Edit grade value just below the lower boundary of the configured grade range
steps: 2. Click the three-dot menu on a grade cell
4. Enter a value just below the minimum grade value in the Grade_Value field
test_cases.expected_result: Saving is blocked; inline error message indicates the value is outside the configured grade range

test_cases.test_case: Edit grade value at the upper boundary of the configured grade range
steps: 2. Click the three-dot menu on a grade cell
4. Enter the maximum grade value in the Grade_Value field
test_cases.expected_result: Grade is updated successfully; the new grade value is displayed in the table

test_cases.test_case: Edit grade value just above the upper boundary of the configured grade range
steps: 2. Click the three-dot menu on a grade cell
4. Enter a value just above the maximum grade value in the Grade_Value field
test_cases.expected_result: Saving is blocked; inline error message indicates the value is outside the configured grade range

test_cases.test_case: Rapid re-submission after profile edit
preconditions: User has successfully updated the profile
steps: 2. Make changes to the profile fields
4. Immediately click 'Edit profile' again after the success message
test_cases.expected_result: Profile edit form is shown blank; no pre-filled data appears

test_cases.test_case: View Data retention summary
test_cases.expected_result: Data retention details displayed

test_cases.test_case: View First access date
test_cases.expected_result: First access details displayed

test_cases.test_case: View Last access date
test_cases.expected_result: Last access details displayed

test_cases.test_case: Update profile with valid data
steps: 2. Enter <valid first name> in the First Name field
3. Enter <valid last name> in the Last Name field
4. Enter <valid email> in the Email Address field
5. Upload a <valid image file> in the New Picture Upload area
test_cases.expected_result: The profile page refreshes to show the updated information.

test_cases.test_case: Cancel profile edit
test_cases.expected_result: Exits without making changes.

test_cases.test_case: Leave the First Name field blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the First Name field blank
2. Fill all other required fields with valid data
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the First_Name field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Last Name field blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Last Name field blank
2. Fill all other required fields with valid data
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Last_Name field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Email Address field blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Email Address field blank
2. Fill all other required fields with valid data
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Email_Address field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Upload a file that does not meet the upload constraints
steps: 1. Select a file that does not meet the upload constraints
2. Fill all other required fields with valid data
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears indicating the file does not meet the upload constraints

test_cases.test_case: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the First_Name, Last_Name, and Email_Address fields indicating they are required

test_cases.test_case: Upload a file exactly at the size limit for New Picture Upload
preconditions: User is logged in and on the profile edit page
steps: 1. Drag and drop a file that is exactly at the size limit into the New Picture Upload area
2. Fill in all required fields with valid data
test_cases.expected_result: Profile is updated successfully; the profile page refreshes.

test_cases.test_case: Upload a file one byte over the size limit for New Picture Upload
preconditions: User is logged in and on the profile edit page
steps: 1. Drag and drop a file that is one byte over the size limit into the New Picture Upload area
2. Fill in all required fields with valid data
test_cases.expected_result: Upload is blocked; an error message is displayed indicating the file exceeds the size limit.

test_cases.test_case: Enter a very long string in the Description field
preconditions: User is logged in and on the profile edit page
steps: 2. Enter a string longer than 200 characters in the Description field
3. Fill in all other required fields with valid data
test_cases.expected_result: Profile is updated successfully; the profile page refreshes, and the description is saved correctly.

test_cases.test_case: Enter special characters in the First Name field
preconditions: User is logged in and on the profile edit page
steps: 1. Enter special characters (e.g., @, #, $, %) in the First Name field
2. Fill in all other required fields with valid data
test_cases.expected_result: Profile is updated successfully; the profile page refreshes, and the special characters are saved correctly.

test_cases.test_case: User logs out successfully
test_cases.expected_result: terminates the current authenticated session and redirects to the login page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to log out while unauthenticated
steps: 1. Ensure the user is not authenticated
test_cases.expected_result: Logout action is blocked; user remains on the current page and is not redirected to the login page

test_cases.test_case: User attempts to log out after being authenticated
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page; session is terminated successfully.

test_cases.test_case: User attempts to log out when not authenticated
test_cases.expected_result: Logout action is blocked; user remains on the current page with no session termination.
